---
title: "Robert Hutto"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [The Madison Square Garden Effect in the NBA](../nyc-open-data-2026/04-MSG-effect-Robert.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/robhutto)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-hutto-2497ab181/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-6343-6459)
